prompt: A young adult East Asian woman standing in the doorway of a quiet old town street, framed from the top of the head to the upper thighs. The subject is turned away from the camera at a three-quarter back angle, body slightly toward the left, waist naturally rotated; head turned back from the left shoulder looking calmly at the camera. Quiet, restrained expression with a slight sense of detachment, lips naturally closed, no obvious smile. She has a soft, delicate oval face, almond-shaped dark brown eyes, natural eyebrows, a slender nose bridge, and light nude pink lips. Light makeup, fair neutral skin, preserving real pores, fine vellus hair, subtle skin tone variations, and natural highlights, no plastic smoothing. She has extremely long, thick deep black wavy hair, center or slightly side-parted, falling from shoulders to waist/hips, soft and fluffy with natural large waves and few stray hairs. She wears a pure white tight-fitting short-sleeved cropped T-shirt, round neck, soft cotton fabric, hem ending above the waistline, revealing a bit of the lower back. Lower body in brown and cream horizontal striped high-waisted tight-fitting lounge shorts, even horizontal stripes, simple cut, soft fabric fitting the body naturally. Natural relaxed pose, one hand lightly gathered at the abdomen or waist, the other hanging naturally or hidden. Subject leans against a dark brown old wooden door or wall; background shows a narrow old street, grey-white walls, shops, potted plants, and blurred pedestrians. Natural diffuse light on a cloudy day, low saturation, low contrast, soft skin tones, light shadows. 85mm portrait lens, f/1.8, shallow depth of field, focus on eyes and face, background blurred, slight film grain, realistic optical bokeh, Japanese street lifestyle photography, photorealistic. Avoid: front-facing pose, wrong turn-back direction, short hair, straight/stiff wigs, exaggerated body, wrong stripes, deformed fingers, distorted spine, excessive smoothing, heavy makeup, strong HDR, over-sharpening, cartoon, CG, text, watermark, Logo.

promptZh: 一位年轻的东亚女性站在 安静古镇街道的门口，构图范围从头顶到大腿上部。主体背对镜头呈四分之三侧背角度，身体略微向左，腰部自然扭转；头部从左肩回望，平静地注视着镜头。表情安静克制，带有一丝疏离感，双唇自然闭合，没有明显的笑容。她拥有柔和精致的鹅蛋脸，杏仁状的深棕色眼睛，自然的眉毛，鼻梁挺拔，嘴唇呈浅裸粉色。淡妆，肤色白皙中性，保留真实的毛孔、细微的绒毛、微妙的肤色变化和自然的高光，没有塑料感的磨皮。她留着极长且浓密的 乌黑波浪卷发，中分或略微侧分，从肩部垂至腰部或臀部，发质柔软蓬松，带有自然的波浪感，有少量碎发。她身穿一件 纯白色紧身短袖露脐 T 恤，圆领，柔软的棉质面料，下摆位于腰线上方，露出一点后腰。下身穿着棕色与米色横条纹高腰紧身休闲短裤，横条纹均匀，剪裁简约，面料自然贴合身体。姿势自然放松，一只手轻搭在腹部或腰间，另一只手自然下垂或隐藏。主体倚靠在深棕色的老木门或墙壁上；背景展示了一条狭窄的古街，灰白色的墙壁、店铺、盆栽和模糊的行人。阴天自然漫射光，低饱和度，低对比度，肤色柔和，阴影轻柔。85mm 人像镜头，f/1.8，浅景深，焦点对准眼睛和面部，背景虚化，轻微胶片颗粒感，真实的镜头虚化效果，日系街头生活摄影，照片级真实感。避免：正面姿势、回望方向错误、短发、直发/僵硬的假发、夸张的身材、条纹错误、手指畸形、脊柱扭曲、过度磨皮、浓妆、强 HDR、过度锐化、卡通、CG、文字、水印、Logo。
